@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class FluidAudioSpeechModelLoaderTests: XCTestCase {
+    @MainActor
+    func testLoadRequiresFluidAudioVariantIdentifier() async throws {
+        let runtime = TestFluidAudioLoaderRuntime()
+        let loader = FluidAudioSpeechModelLoader(runtime: runtime)
+        let invalidModel = SpeechModelDescriptor(
+            id: "broken-fluid-model",
+            title: "Broken",
+            variantLabel: "broken",
+            approximateSizeLabel: "~0 MB",
+            backend: .fluidAudio,
+            whisperVariant: nil,
+            cachePathComponents: [],
+            fluidAudioVariant: nil,
+            supportsSpeakerFiltering: false
+        )
+
+        do {
+            try await loader.load(
+                invalidModel,
+                whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions(
+                    verbose: false,
+                    logLevel: .errorOnly,
+                    prewarm: false,
+                    load: true
+                )
+            )
+            XCTFail("Expected missing variant identifier to fail.")
+        } catch {
+            XCTAssertEqual(error.localizedDescription, "Speech model configuration is invalid for broken-fluid-model.")
+        }
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testFluidAudioLoaderDelegatesCacheDownloadLoadAndReset() async throws {
+        let runtime = TestFluidAudioLoaderRuntime()
+        runtime.cachedVariants = ["v3"]
+        let loader = FluidAudioSpeechModelLoader(runtime: runtime)
+
+        let isCached = try await loader.isCached(.fluidParakeetV3)
+        XCTAssertTrue(isCached)
+
+        try await loader.download(.fluidParakeetV3) { _ in }
+        try await loader.load(
+            .fluidParakeetV3,
+            whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions(
+                verbose: false,
+                logLevel: .errorOnly,
+                prewarm: false,
+                load: true
+            )
+        )
+        await loader.resetLoadedModels()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            runtime.calls,
+            ["isCached:v3", "download:v3", "load:v3", "reset"]
+        )
+    }
+}
+
+private final class TestFluidAudioLoaderRuntime: FluidAudioRuntimeLoading, @unchecked Sendable {
+    var cachedVariants: Set<String> = []
+    var calls: [String] = []
+
+    func isCached(versionIdentifier: String) async throws -> Bool {
+        calls.append("isCached:\(versionIdentifier)")
+        return cachedVariants.contains(versionIdentifier)
+    }
+
+    func download(versionIdentifier: String, progress: @escaping @Sendable (Double) -> Void) async throws {
+        calls.append("download:\(versionIdentifier)")
+        progress(1.0)
+    }
+
+    func load(versionIdentifier: String) async throws {
+        calls.append("load:\(versionIdentifier)")
+    }
+
+    func transcribe(audioSamples: [Float]) async throws -> String? {
+        nil
+    }
+
+    func reset() async {
+        calls.append("reset")
+    }
+}
